reviews.comment:
Un lugar de paso, con buena variedad de productos. Rico café, las medialunas aceptables y los precios razonables. Si estás en la zona y querés un café al paso este lugar no te defrauda.

(Translated by Google)
A convenient spot with a good variety of products. The coffee is good, the croissants are decent, and the prices are reasonable. If you're in the area and want a quick coffee, this place won't disappoint.
